title: Section 5A
content: 1[ 5A. Appeal to National Green Tribunal.—Any person aggrieved by any directions issues under section 5, on or after the commencement of the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010, may file an appeal to the National Green Tribunal established under section 3 of the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010, in accordance with the provisions of that Act.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 19 of 2010, s. 36 and Schedule III (w.e.f. 18-10-2010).
